title: Count Vowels
description: Given a string x containing only lowercase alphabetic characters, return the number of vowels (i.e., a, e, i, o, u) in the string as integer. For instance: Input='borbone', Output=3
inputFormat: String x containing only lowercase alphabetic characters
outputFormat: Integer capturing the number of vowels in x
hint: Try defining a string or a set containing all the vowels ('aeiouAEIOU') and check against it
